instructions: DEMONSTRATION FIXTURE NOTE: This file uses CAGE questionnaire content to demonstrate the engine's BinaryQuestion capability. It is NOT intended as a clinical screening tool and must not be used for clinical purposes. A score of 2 or more on the clinical instrument warrants follow-up by a healthcare professional. -- Original instructions: Please answer Yes or No to the following questions.

Alcohol Concern.label: Alcohol Use Concern
Alcohol Concern.overview: The CAGE questionnaire is a brief screening instrument used to identify potential alcohol use concerns. Each 'Yes' answer contributes one point.
Alcohol Concern.highMeaning: A high score (2 or more Yes answers) on the original clinical instrument is associated with a higher likelihood of alcohol use disorder and warrants follow-up with a healthcare professional.
Alcohol Concern.lowMeaning: A low score (0 or 1 Yes answers) on the original clinical instrument is generally associated with lower risk, though it does not rule out alcohol-related concerns.

Alcohol Concern.High: This demonstration result is for informational purposes only. If you have concerns about alcohol use, please speak with a qualified healthcare professional.
Alcohol Concern.Moderate: This demonstration result is for informational purposes only. If you have concerns about alcohol use, please speak with a qualified healthcare professional.
Alcohol Concern.Low: This demonstration result is for informational purposes only. If you have any concerns about your health, please speak with a qualified healthcare professional.

questions.text: Have you ever felt you should Cut down on your drinking?
Have people Annoyed you by criticising your drinking?
Have you ever felt bad or Guilty about your drinking?
Have you ever had a drink first thing in the morning to steady your nerves or get rid of a hangover (Eye opener)?
